DP.093.0000:
Welcome to the Herb Shop, home of
effective yet inexpensive medicine.
DP.093.0001:
Herbal meds work most impressively.
But your Pokémon won’t like them.\r
They’re horribly bitter and smelly!
DP.093.0002:
Someone ought to invent herbal
medicine that isn’t bitter.\f
That would be a medical breakthrough!
